description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure with a prominent service counter and an overhead signboard. The front and side panels feature bold, high-contrast printed signage with text in both white and red on a black background, while the rear and interior surfaces are finished in a light wood texture. The kiosk has an open front for customer interaction, with a recessed counter and a shelf below for storage or display. The upper section is framed by a rectangular signboard, providing ample space for branding or information. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for temporary or semi-permanent installation in urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with bold printed signage, open front counter, and light wood interior surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing a black panel with bold white and red text, and the depth of the counter structure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open service counter, large overhead signboard, and 'HISTORY OF JANCOk' text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with identical signage and counter depth visible.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing plain light wood paneling with no signage or openings.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign panels on front and both sides, integrated into the structure, with bold text: 'JARE SOPO JANCOk IKU DUSO ?', 'HISTORY OF JANCOk', and branding on the signboard.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a rectangular overhead signboard, no visible overhangs or decorative elements.
